calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-27-2004 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-22-2004 Reset To Jul-27-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Margaret Ashwell.
Petitioner: Zachariah James Frangoulis, present in pro per and unable to provide proof of publication to the court.
Without any opposition, the Court contined this matter to July 27, 2004 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218, for original Proof of Publication.
